title: JO/YETM E2L5/Ryewater Farm SSSI overhead line, S37 Consent, Electricity Act 1989
body: "Secretary of State’s screening decisions in accordance with the Electricity Works (Environmental Impact Assessment) (England and Wales) Regulations 2017.  Date of decision  28 May 2025  Location   between Bracket’s Coppice and Ryewater Farm Site of Special Scientific Interest (SSSI), Bracket’s Coppice Special Area of Conservation (SAC) and Dorset National Landscape   Type of project / consent requested  Section 37 consent to install or keep installed an electric line.  "

taxons.title: Energy industry and infrastructure licensing and regulation
